Full-Fleet Load Test, Failure Simulation, and Recovery Drill

Stress-test the full 47,979-agent control system with simulated load, failure scenarios, recovery verification, circuit breakers, and audit proof.

1. Load-test control panel

This is a control-plane load test, not raw fleet activation.

Total registered agents: 47,979
Total departments: 1,777
Full fleet cap: 47,979
Load-test mode: simulation/control-plane test
Current load test status: none

Failure simulation does not execute destructive actions.

Failure scenarios: 0 simulated

Circuit breaker status: clear

5. Recovery drill panel

Recovery drills: 0 executed

6. Safe-state verification panel

Recovery drill verification does not perform rollback execution.

Safe-state restoration means the control system returns to a blocked/paused/audited state.

Safe-state restored status: false
